title: Indulgent Italian Tuna Pasta
description: A creamy, protein-packed Italian pasta with tuna, infused with shio-cure salt and fresh herbs, perfect for post-workout recovery.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the paccheri al dente, about 11 minutes.
While pasta cooks, drain the canned tuna, reserving the oil.
In a medium saucepan, stir the heavy whipping cream, reserved tuna oil, shio-cure salt, and lemon zest over medium heat until the mixture begins to simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce thicken for 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the cooked paccheri to the saucepan, tossing gently to coat the pasta evenly.
Stir in the grated Parmigiano-Reggiano and cracked black pepper until the cheese melts and sauce is glossy.
Remove from heat, fold in fresh basil leaves, and transfer the dish to a talavera plate.
Serve immediately, allowing the residual heat to finish warming the pasta.
